"use strict";
const dev = {
  wxAppId: "YOUR_WX_APP_ID",
  emas: {
    spaceId: "YOUR_EMAS_SPACE_ID",
    clientSecret: "YOUR_EMAS_CLIENT_SECRET",
    endpoint: "https://api.next.bspapp.com"
  }
};
const prod = {
  wxAppId: "YOUR_WX_APP_ID",
  emas: {
    spaceId: "YOUR_EMAS_SPACE_ID",
    clientSecret: "YOUR_EMAS_CLIENT_SECRET",
    endpoint: "https://api.next.bspapp.com"
  }
};
const ENV_CONFIG = {
  dev,
  prod
};
const ENV = "dev";
const TEST_ACCOUNT_ID = "dk_test_user_001";
const currentEnv = ENV_CONFIG[ENV] || ENV_CONFIG.dev;
const WX_APPID = currentEnv.wxAppId;
const EMAS_CONFIG = currentEnv.emas;
exports.EMAS_CONFIG = EMAS_CONFIG;
exports.TEST_ACCOUNT_ID = TEST_ACCOUNT_ID;
exports.WX_APPID = WX_APPID;
//# sourceMappingURL=../../.sourcemap/mp-weixin/config/index.js.map
